description: A film production has wrapped, and all its digital assets must be archived for long-term storage.

nodes.task_description: Identify all digital assets associated with the completed film project.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a complete list of all video, audio, and project files.

nodes.task_description: Run a data integrity check (e.g., checksum) on all files to ensure they are not corrupt.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the integrity of all files before archiving.

nodes.task_description: Transfer all verified assets to the long-term archival storage system (e.g., LTO tape library).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates and completes the transfer to archival storage.
